framework.name: Transparent Marketplace Competitive Intelligence
framework.description: Newer expert network platforms (DeepBench mentioned) allow searching competitor profiles including their hourly rates. Example: 24 State Farm agents visible with rates $60-300/hour, enabling data-driven rate positioning at $250-300 to maximize earnings without overpricing.
framework.raw_quote: search for State Farm agents on DeepBench and you'll find profiles of nearly two dozen current and former agents available for projects, with hourly rates ranging from $60 – $300.

source.title: Setting Your Expert Network Consulting Rate • Expert Opportunities
